items.title: Artificial Intelligence (AI)
items.explanation: AI aise systems banane ka kshetra hai jo insaan jaise sochne aur faisla lene wale kaam kar sakte hain.
items.analogy: Jaise ek trainee jo practice se better hota jata hai, AI bhi data se seekhta hai.
items.example: Spam filter email ko spam ya important category me classify karta hai.
items.usage: Chatbots, fraud detection, recommendation systems, aur automation me AI use hota hai.

deepExample.title: HR Chatbot me AI ka istemal
deepExample.context: Ek company employee policy ke sawalon ka jawab dene ke liye AI assistant bana rahi hai.
setup: Team policy documents ko collect karke clean text banati hai.
System query format aur expected answer style define karta hai.
realtimeFlow: Employee sawal karta hai aur system intent detect karta hai.
Assistant policy context dekhkar policy-aligned jawab generate karta hai.
deepExample.whyBetter: Isse fast aur consistent answers milte hain aur HR team ka repetitive load kam hota hai.
failureModes: Agar policy update reflect na ho to assistant outdated jawab de sakta hai.
Agar inputs ambiguous ho to clarification ke bina galat interpretation ho sakta hai.
